{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Iron Enforcer
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iron]] [[Enforcers]] are part of the combatants.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A gray-haired [[Iron Enforcer]] crashed into [[Lindon]]'s arm.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
